pillars.title: Time-to-learning

pillars.title: AI-ready stack
pillars.body: Clean data pipelines, embedding stores and guardrails: ready for assistants, semantic search and safe automation.

About.headline: We don't build sites. We build systems that bring you clients.
About.body: Alvenco Ltd is a web and app studio based in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire. Our team operates across UK and Italy — building digital products for businesses that want to grow in both markets.
About.proof: Our track record includes CivicAlert, a civic AI reporting platform deployed across UK local authorities — proof that we build things that scale.
About.cta: Book a free 15-minute call. No commitment.

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.q1: How much does a website cost?
FAQ.a1: Our websites start from £600 for a landing page up to £15,000+ for a full corporate platform. Every project gets a personalised quote. We also serve Italian clients with pricing in EUR.
FAQ.q2: Do you work with Italian companies?
FAQ.a2: Yes. We operate across both UK and Italy. We handle IT and EN content, UK GDPR and EU GDPR compliance, and billing in both GBP and EUR.
FAQ.q3: What is a free site audit?
FAQ.a3: A 15-minute call where we review your current site and tell you exactly what's stopping it from converting. No strings attached. Book via the contact form.
FAQ.q4: How long does a website project take?
FAQ.a4: Landing pages: 1–2 weeks. Full websites: 4–8 weeks. E-commerce: 6–12 weeks. Mobile apps: 3–6 months depending on complexity.
FAQ.a5: Next.js, React Native, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Supabase, and AI integrations (OpenAI, Google Vision). We choose the right tool for each project, not the trendy one.
FAQ.q6: How do I get started with a website for my business?
FAQ.a6: The first step is a free 15-minute call with our team. We listen to your goals, current situation and budget — then we prepare a clear proposal within 48 hours. No commitment required at this stage. Simply use the contact form or email us at hello@alvenco.co.uk.
FAQ.q7: I want to start a business — do I need a website from day one?
FAQ.a7: Not necessarily, but having a professional digital presence from the start significantly increases credibility with potential clients, investors and partners. Even a well-built landing page with your offer, contact details and a clear call to action can generate enquiries immediately. We can have you online within 1–2 weeks.
FAQ.q8: What is the difference between a website and a web application?
FAQ.a8: A website presents information — it's what users read and browse. A web application allows users to interact, log in, manage data, make purchases or perform actions. Most modern businesses need a hybrid: a site that looks great and also performs actions like booking, purchasing or account management. We build both.
FAQ.q9: How do I choose the right agency to build my website or app?
FAQ.a9: Look for three things: a clear portfolio with real results, transparent pricing with no hidden costs, and a team that asks about your business goals before talking about technology. Be cautious of agencies that lead with tools and frameworks rather than outcomes. We always start from the business problem, not the tech stack.
FAQ.q10: Can you redesign my existing website without losing my Google ranking?
FAQ.a10: Yes — and this is critical. A redesign done without SEO care can destroy years of ranking. We conduct a full SEO audit before any redesign, preserve all existing URLs or set up correct redirects, and transfer all structured data and metadata. Your Google visibility is protected throughout the process.
FAQ.q11: Do you offer website maintenance after launch?
FAQ.a11: Yes. We offer monthly maintenance plans starting from £120/month covering security updates, performance monitoring, content changes, bug fixes and uptime checks. Long-term clients also get priority response times. A website without maintenance is a liability — we make sure yours stays fast, secure and up to date.
FAQ.q12: Can you integrate AI into my website or app?
FAQ.a12: Absolutely. AI integration is one of our core strengths. We implement AI for: intelligent chatbots and customer service automation, content analysis and moderation, personalisation engines, predictive search, image recognition, and automated reporting. We use OpenAI, Google AI, and custom models depending on the use case — always where it genuinely adds business value.
FAQ.q13: What is an MVP and do I need one for my app idea?
FAQ.a13: An MVP (Minimum Viable Product) is the smallest version of your app that delivers real value to users and allows you to test market demand before investing in the full product. For most new app ideas, starting with an MVP is the right approach — it reduces risk, speeds up time to market, and generates real user feedback. We specialise in building focused, well-engineered MVPs that are designed to scale.
FAQ.q14: How do you handle data privacy and GDPR compliance?
FAQ.a14: All our projects are built with privacy by design. We implement cookie consent management, privacy policies, data minimisation principles, and secure data handling from day one. For UK clients we follow UK GDPR; for EU clients we follow EU GDPR; for global clients we apply the stricter of the two as a baseline. We also advise on which data processors and third-party services are compliant.
FAQ.q15: What makes Alvenco different from other web agencies?
FAQ.a15: Three things: we operate across UK and Italy with a distributed senior team, which means no single point of failure and broad market knowledge. We build with modern, production-grade technology — not WordPress templates or drag-and-drop builders. And we measure success by business outcomes — leads generated, conversion rates, revenue — not just by delivering a file. We don't disappear after launch.

FinalCTA.headline: Ready to turn your site into a client machine?
FinalCTA.subheadline: Book a free 15-minute audit call. We'll tell you exactly what's holding your site back — no commitment, no sales pitch.

hero.label: About us
hero.title: A studio built between two countries, for the whole world
hero.subtitle: Alvenco Ltd is registered in the UK and operates with a distributed team across England and Italy. We build digital products for businesses that want to grow — regardless of where they are.

story.title: Why Alvenco exists
story.body: We started from a simple observation: too many businesses have a digital presence that doesn't work. Sites that don't rank, apps that don't convert, e-commerce that loses customers at checkout. Alvenco was born to fix this — with a pragmatic approach, clear pricing and measurable results.

team.title: Who we are
team.body: We are a small, senior team. Alessandro Fiscella leads development and technical architecture from Italy. Our commercial operations are based in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire and is led by Vincenzo Sedita. We work remotely with clients across the UK, Europe and beyond — time zones are not a barrier.

values.title: How we work
values.v1_body: We explain what we do in plain language. You always know what you're paying for and why.
values.v2_body: Every decision is justified by a business outcome — more leads, lower bounce rate, faster load time.
values.v3_body: We build things that last. Clean code, documented systems, no vendor lock-in.
values.v4_body: Fixed prices, clear timelines, honest assessments. If something isn't right for you, we'll tell you.
